hero.subline: Each piece is made once, made properly, and made to last.

bespoke.heading: Every piece begins with a conversation.
bespoke.body: Collection Noir pieces are made to order, in the stone, scale, and finish that suit the room they're going into. Bespoke commissions are welcome.

collection_overview.title: Every piece, made to order
collection_overview.intro: Browse by category, or enquire directly for a bespoke commission.

paragraphs: Collection Noir Atelier was founded in London in 2020 by Samantha Santini, an interior designer with over ten years specifying furniture for private clients before founding the brand.
Every commission begins as a drawing in the London atelier. From there, it's realised by hands trained over generations — Italian craftsmanship closes that gap. It always has.
The collection extends beyond tables into case goods — bedside tables and storage pieces that bring stone, timber and bronze together. Every piece is made to order.

founder.name: Samantha Santini
founder.role: Founder & Designer — Collection Noir Atelier, London

designers.heading: For designers
designers.title: A working relationship, not a transaction
designers.body: Collection Noir Atelier works directly with interior designers and architects on a project-by-project basis — trade pricing, a dedicated point of contact, and the kind of specification support a client presentation actually needs. If you specify for a living, this is built for how you work.

continue_links.title: The Materials
continue_links.desc: A guide to the stones, timbers and metals we work with.

continue_links.title: Caring for your piece
continue_links.desc: Guidance for stone, timber and metal, by material.
